project_type: Static HTML single-page website (saved/downloaded page with embedded CSS and base64 images)
build_system: None - single HTML file with embedded styles and inline scripts
test_command: N/A - verify with grep checks on the HTML file
verification_instructions: Verify all text replacements were made correctly by grepping the HTML file for old values (should return 0 matches) and new values (should return expected matches)
setup_instructions: No setup needed - single HTML file editing
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - no external access. All changes are text transformations within the HTML file.
key_patterns: Single large HTML file with embedded CSS in <style> tag, base64-encoded images, savepage metadata. File is 1366 lines. Key sections: header (nav with brand), hero section, trust section, achievement section (MDRT/COT), products section, QnA section, fun facts section, footer.
directory_structure: Root contains only Web1.html and Pj.jpg
